title: stelis umbelliformis subsp. umbelliformis
intro: Stelis umbelliformis subsp. umbelliformis, also known as the yellow orchid, is a species of orchid that belongs to the genus Stelis and is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been employed to treat various health issues such as wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Stelis umbelliformis subsp. umbelliformis include its ability to soothe and calm the skin, reduce inflammation, and promote the healing process, making it a valuable natural remedy for various ailments. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant can be used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use should be under the guidance of a healthcare professional due to potential interactions with other medications.
